fields.summary: Stripe Payout Failures: International Bank Routing Validation Error
fields.description: Critical Bug: Since last week's bank routing library upgrade, cross-border payouts to UK and EU routing formats (IBAN/BIC) are failing regex validation checks. The engine throws a ValidationError and cancels the outbound payout. Alice is looking into updating the regex rules in `validators.py` to support variable-length BIC/SWIFT identifiers.

fields.summary: Duplicate Transaction Charges Due to Network Timeout Retries on Mobile Clients
fields.description: CRITICAL: During checkout network degradation, some iOS clients are retrying payments without sending the mandatory `idempotency_key` header, or are generating a new idempotency key on each retry. This is resulting in duplicate credit card charges on Adyen gateway. Need to modify mobile API gatekeeper to reject charge requests lacking a deterministic idempotency header.

fields.summary: Deprecate v1.2 Payment API Headers and Route to Legacy Adapter Service
fields.description: Refactor: In order to support the new microservice architecture, we are deprecating the `v1.2` payment endpoints. We need to create a routing rule in Envoy to forward any request with header `X-API-Version: 1.2` to a dedicated `legacy-payment-adapter` service, logging a deprecation warning to Datadog.
